// VOID HUNTERS - Space Fantasy Combat
// Eight beasts in the deep black. One plasma blade.
// Applesoft Lite (P-LAB microSD) - 3564 bytes
// Usage: 6000R (cold start), paste this, then 6003R, RUN
//
